data.body: DONE: TOML loader + discovery + layering in src/rebar/config.py. Schema-driven coerce_sparse (only-present keys, no defaults) + merge_sparse (later-wins per key) + from_mapping applies defaults ONCE — so a lower layer's default never clobbers a higher layer's explicit value (the sparse-merge property). load_config layers defaults<user(XDG)<project(rebar.toml/[tool.rebar]/legacy .rebar.conf)<env(REBAR_<SECT>_<KEY>)<cli. Upward discovery stops at .git/fs-root; $REBAR_CONFIG short-circuits; malformed/unreadable -> ConfigError (fail-closed). Hand-rolled XDG (no platformdirs). 20 loader tests covering every location, all precedence pairs, partial-section cross-layer merge, upward discovery, .git boundary, portability (identical across roots/cwd), unknown-warn, fail-closed + the 4 review-flagged combos. Subagent-reviewed: solid, no bugs. Unit tier green (247 passed). Perf no-caching note -> e211.
